languages.text: "Если не хотите помереть сей же час — собирайте людей и отправляйтесь добывать прометий. Трудом и потом замолите свой грех перед Ним".

traits.locale_text: "Если не хотите помереть сей же час — собирайте людей и отправляйтесь добывать прометиум. Трудом и потом замолите свой грех перед Ним".
"Если не хотите помереть сей же час — собирайте людей и отправляйтесь добывать прометий. Трудом и потом замолите свой грех перед Ним".

languages.text: "Unless you want to die here and now, gather the people you have left and go to extract promethium. Atone in His eyes with sweat and toil."
languages.original_text: "Если не хотите помереть сей же час — собирайте людей и отправляйтесь добывать прометий. Трудом и потом замолите свой грех перед Ним".

traits.locale_text: "Unless you want to die here and now, gather the people you have left and go to extract promethium. Atone for your sins before Him with sweat and toil."
"Unless you want to die here and now, gather the people you have left and go to extract promethium. Atone for your sins before Him with sweat and toil."
"Unless you want to die here and now, gather the people you have left and go to extract promethium. Atone in His eyes with sweat and toil."

languages.text: "Wenn du nicht hier und jetzt sterben willst, versammle die Leute, die du noch hast, und geh zum Promethiumabbau. Büßt in seinen Augen mit Schweiß und Mühsal."
languages.original_text: "Unless you want to die here and now, gather the people you have left and go to extract promethium. Atone in His eyes with sweat and toil."

languages.text: "A moins que vous ne vouliez mourir ici et maintenant, rassemblez les gens qui vous restent et allez extraire du prométhium. Expirez à ses yeux par la sueur et le labeur."
languages.original_text: "Unless you want to die here and now, gather the people you have left and go to extract promethium. Atone in His eyes with sweat and toil."

languages.text: "除非你想现在就死在这里" "否则就召集你剩下的人" "去提取钷元素用汗水和辛劳来赎罪"
languages.original_text: "Unless you want to die here and now, gather the people you have left and go to extract promethium. Atone in His eyes with sweat and toil."

languages.text: "A menos que quieras morir aquí y ahora, reúne a la gente que te queda y ve a extraer prometio. Expíalo ante sus ojos con sudor y trabajo".
languages.original_text: "Unless you want to die here and now, gather the people you have left and go to extract promethium. Atone in His eyes with sweat and toil."

languages.text: "今ここで死にたくなければ、残っている人たちを集めてプロメチウムを採りに行きなさい。汗と労苦で主の目に償いを。"
languages.original_text: "Unless you want to die here and now, gather the people you have left and go to extract promethium. Atone in His eyes with sweat and toil."

languages.text: "Burada ve şimdi ölmek istemiyorsanız, kalan insanları toplayın ve prometyum çıkarmaya gidin. Ter ve emekle O'nun gözünde kefaretinizi ödeyin."
languages.original_text: "Unless you want to die here and now, gather the people you have left and go to extract promethium. Atone in His eyes with sweat and toil."
